step_rationale: NET component; found in coronary thrombi; prothrombotic.
mechanism: Citrullinated histone H3 from neutrophil extracellular traps is incorporated into coronary thrombi, promoting platelet activation and coagulation.

references.title: Characterization of Neutrophil Extracellular Traps in Acute Myocardial Infarction: A Translational Study.
